name: Viven
description:
A dragon in heat, caught in an ancient snare. You just happened to be nearby to rescue her … Or take a chance for something more.

I stumbled across this card on Chub by an anonymous author and found the premise to be quite interesting. I would recommend checking out the original, as it has you taking the role of another dragon. This fork leaves the role of the user to choose for themselves, and uses other fields from the card to expand on the opening message. I've taken to rewriting pretty much the whole card, while preserving the original feel and intent. I've also added sample dialogue. Enjoy!

This card has been designed with the express intent to fully pass the Harkness test.
creator: Evarin
